allow: Bash(curl -s -w "\\n\\nHTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}" https://api.inceptionlabs.ai/v1/chat/completions -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer sk_7c012b5f685dec7217f536b3e8c07265" -d '{""model"":""mercury-2"",""messages"":[{""role"":""user"",""content"":""Reply with exactly: Mercury 2 is working.""}],""max_tokens"":30}')

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "$key=''sk_7c012b5f685dec7217f536b3e8c07265''; $b=''{""model"":""mercury-2"",""messages"":[{""role"":""user"",""content"":""Reply: Mercury 2 is working.""}],""max_tokens"":30}''; try { $r=Invoke-RestMethod -Uri ''https://api.inceptionlabs.ai/v1/chat/completions'' -Method Post -Headers @{Authorization=""Bearer $key"";''Content-Type''=''application/json''} -Body $b; Write-Host ''STATUS: 200''; Write-Host \(''REPLY: '' + $r.choices[0].message.content\); Write-Host \(''TOKENS in/out: '' + $r.usage.prompt_tokens + ''/'' + $r.usage.completion_tokens\) } catch { Write-Host \(''ERROR: '' + $_Exception.Message\) }")
